pricing.title: Simple pricing, no subscription
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade to Family whenever you're ready.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect to try Stop Repeat with your child.

family.name: Family
family.description: For the whole family, no recurring fees.

hero.description: Stop Repeat automates reminders, task tracking and rewards so your children become independent — and you can breathe.
hero.heroAlt: Happy family with independent children completing their tasks

features.title: Everything you need for an organized family
features.subtitle: Tools designed to reduce your mental load and foster your children's independence.
features.smartTasksDesc: Create recurring tasks with schedules, points and photo evidence. Everything is automated.
features.autoRemindersDesc: Push notifications and voice reading of instructions. No more repeating yourself.
features.photoProofDesc: The child sends a photo, the parent validates. Simple and effective.
features.rewardsDesc: Points, reward shop and streak bonuses to encourage independence.
features.rulesDesc: Rule catalog with automatic penalties and configurable thresholds.
features.streaksDesc: Streaks, statistics and visible progress to motivate daily.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to end repetitive reminders.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up, add your children and set up profiles in minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Create recurring tasks, set schedules and associated rewards.
howItWorks.step3Title: Let the app do the work
howItWorks.step3Desc: Reminders, validations and rewards are automated. You don't have to repeat anything.

settings.subtitle: Configure your family's rules and settings
settings.pointsMoneyDesc: Set the conversion rate between earned points and real money
settings.currencyDesc: Choose the currency for wallet and conversions
settings.streaksBonusDesc: Reward consistency with a bonus on earned points
settings.streakHint: Bonus added to points when the child maintains a streak of consecutive days
settings.penaltiesDesc: Maximum number of penalties per day before alert
settings.delaysDesc: Configure delays for reminders and notifications
settings.reminderHint: A reminder notification will be sent to the child X minutes before each task's deadline
settings.parentAlertHint: Time before notifying the parent if a task is not completed
settings.photosDesc: Retention period for task evidence photos
settings.validationRate: Conversion rate must be between 0 and 100
settings.validationStreak: Streak bonus must be between 0 and 100%
settings.validationPenalty: Penalty threshold must be between 1 and 50
settings.pinDesc: Set a 4-digit PIN code to protect access to your parent account from the profile switcher.
settings.changePasswordDesc: Set a new password for your account.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: This action is irreversible. All your personal data will be permanently deleted. Family data (tasks, rewards, rules) will remain accessible to other members.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Your account, profile, and all personal data will be deleted.
settings.deleteAccountSuccess: Your account has been successfully deleted.

avatar.invalidFile: The file is not a valid image.

testimonials.title: They chose Stop Repeat
testimonials.subtitle: Parents and children share their experience with our application.
testimonials.parent1Content: Stop Repeat has transformed our daily life! No more repeating the same things 10 times. The kids know exactly what they need to do and are motivated by the points system. A real relief for the whole family.
testimonials.child1Content: I love earning points! Now I can save up to buy what I want. And I like seeing my badges when I do my tasks well several days in a row.
testimonials.parent2Content: The app is simple and effective. The automatic notifications save us from playing the supervisor role. The kids are really becoming more independent and responsible. I highly recommend it!
testimonials.child2Content: It's cool to be able to take photos to prove I've done my tasks. And my parents give me rewards when I have enough points. It's much more fun than before!
testimonials.parent3Content: We have 3 children and it was total chaos before Stop Repeat. Now, everyone has their tasks, everything is organized in the family calendar, and we've finally found some peace. Thank you!
testimonials.child3Content: I like the app because there are colors and stars. And when I do all my tasks, my parents are happy and so am I!
